allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
Production-ready ASGI deployment: Fix Daphne, WebSockets, SSE & Celery

✅ Fixed ASGI configuration for Daphne deployment
- Updated promptcraft.asgi to use production settings
- Fixed AUTH_USER_MODEL format (users.User vs apps.users.User)
- Added proper error handling for missing dependencies

✅ Enhanced production settings
- Redis-first caching with graceful fallback to in-memory
- Robust database configuration (PostgreSQL → SQLite fallback)
- Fixed channels layer configuration with proper imports
- Production-ready security headers and CORS

✅ Updated Docker & Railway configuration
- Dynamic PORT binding using $PORT:-8000
- Fixed health check to use dynamic port
- Added pre-deployment commands (migrate, collectstatic)
- Production environment variables configuration

✅ Cleaned requirements.txt
- Added missing djangorestframework-simplejwt
- Removed duplicate/old requirement files
- Added production dependencies (sentry-sdk, gunicorn)
- Organized dependencies by category

✅ Fixed Celery configuration
- Updated to use production settings module
- Windows-compatible worker configuration
- Proper task routing and retry policies

✅ WebSocket & SSE ready
- Channels configured with Redis backend
- WebSocket consumers for AI processing
- SSE endpoints for streaming responses
- Health check endpoints available

🚀 Ready for Railway deployment with full WebSocket, SSE, and background task support!

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.ai/code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")
